title: frontend: SimpleTable: Fix synchronous setPage(0) during render
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: normalizedData recomputed each render; if parent passes fresh array reference, currentData === normalizedData will fire the update effect too eagerly. Consider documenting that callers should stabilize the data prop.
filteredData hoisted into useMemo outside the null-check block — eliminates duplicated filter logic.
useEffect for setPage(0) has correct dep array [filteredData, page, rowsPerPage, setPage].
filteredData && guard correctly handles null/loading state before checking length.
